overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a player walking through Night City at night. The player moves from an elevated platform down to street level, crosses a road, navigates through a dark narrow alley with graffiti walls and overgrown vegetation, and emerges back onto a city street with neon signs and light traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated platform with metal railings overlooking street

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated concrete platform with metal railings, looking down at the street below

wooden utility pole with multiple crossbars and hanging wires
large illuminated billboard with colorful advertisements
multi-level building with wooden exterior and balconies
concrete surface with scattered trash and debris

segments.scene_description: The player stands on an elevated concrete platform with metal railings overlooking a city street at night. A wooden building with balconies is visible to the left, and a large neon billboard glows in the distance. The camera moves forward along the platform, turning left to face the street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with sidewalk and crosswalk

events.description: descends from elevated platform to street level
crosses the asphalt road to the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: descending to street level, crossing the road, and walking along the city sidewalk with neon-lit buildings ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: wet asphalt street with lane markings and red curb
low-rise yellow building with flat roof and horizontal lines
tall structure with red neon lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player descends from the platform to street level and crosses the wet asphalt road. A pedestrian crosses in the opposite direction. The player continues along the sidewalk past a yellow building, with palm trees and a neon-lit tower visible ahead in the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between buildings with graffiti-covered walls and overgrown vegetation

events.description: turns right into a narrow dark alley between buildings
player character draws a yellow and black rifle, holding it ready while walking

agents.ego_description: navigating through a dark narrow alleyway with overgrown grass and weeds, holding a rifle, passing parked vehicles and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
abandoned cars including a yellow sports car and dark sedan
metal railings along the right side of the alley
tall grass and weeds covering the dirt ground
steep concrete slope with graffiti and grass

segments.scene_description: The player turns right into a narrow, dark alley between buildings. The space is enclosed by a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the right and a retaining wall on the left, with overgrown vegetation covering the dirt ground. The player draws a yellow rifle and continues past parked abandoned vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley exit leading to street corner with commercial buildings

events.description: emerges from narrow alley back onto open city street
vehicles visible driving on the road ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow passage and emerging back onto a city street, approaching pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the street

entered.detail: small green and white building with air conditioning units and wooden awning
large cylindrical billboard structure with illuminated advertisements
opening to main street with visible traffic and city lights
covered wooden walkway with glass railings

segments.scene_description: The player continues through the narrowing passage and emerges from the alley back onto a city street. A green building with a wooden deck appears on the right, and a large circular neon billboard is visible in the distance. Pedestrians stand near the buildings and vehicles drive along the road as the player approaches the street corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated urban overlook down into a gritty alleyway and back out into the neon-lit city streets. It begins on a concrete platform with metal railings and a glowing billboard in the distance, moving forward before turning to descend toward the street level. As the camera crosses the wet asphalt and passes a yellow building and distant palm trees, the scene shifts abruptly as the player turns right into a narrow, dark alley enclosed by graffiti-covered walls and overgrown vegetation. The camera continues past abandoned vehicles while a yellow rifle is drawn, navigating the tightening passage before finally emerging back into the open city. The environment opens up once more to reveal a green building with a wooden deck and a large circular neon sign as pedestrians and traffic populate the surrounding street corner.
